birds.evidence: 782-783 The hedleyi subspecies is found in southeastern South Australia and western Victoria, and the rosinae subspecies is most commonly found in the Gulf St Vincent region of South Australia.Morcombe, Michael (2012) Field Guide to Australian Birds
